title: Error Creation New Folder (MSSQL Mode)
author: atscripter
body_snippet:
I was successfully able to connect to an MSSQL database but I get an SQL related [error](https://i.imgur.com/iE1ubOP.png) when attempting to create new a "connection" folder.

Running v1.77.1 (portable) on Windows 10 Enterprise 10.0.18363 Build 18363.

iterations.description: SQL NOT NULL constraint violation on 'RedirectAudioCapture' when saving a new folder — DataTableSerializer omits default values for RDP-specific columns on ContainerInfo nodes.

comments.author: farosch
comments.snippet: What version of mRemoteNG are you running?

comments.author: atscripter
comments.snippet: I tested with a normal (non-portable) installation of mRemoteNG with the same result.

comments.author: farosch
comments.snippet: Thank you very much - I'll take a look at this

comments.author: thornt5748
comments.snippet:
I'm also experiencing a similar issue. Fresh install of the latest stable version of mRemoteNG, just connected to SQL, right click connections, New Folder and receive the following:

----------
ErrorMsg
08/19/2020 16:33:50
Couldn't save connections file as ""!
Cannot insert the value NULL into column 'RedirectAudioCapture', table 'mRemoteNG.dbo.tblCons'; column does not allow nulls. INSERT fails.
The statement has been terminated.
----------
ErrorMsg
08/19/2020 16:33:35
Couldn't save ...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): SQL NOT NULL constraint violation on 'RedirectAudioCapture' when saving a new folder — DataTableSerializer omits default values for RDP-specific columns on ContainerInfo nodes.
Approach: In SerializeConnectionInfo(), ensure all NOT NULL columns (RedirectAudioCapture and similar RDP boolean columns) receive a default value (false/empty string) when the node is a ContainerInfo, either via DBNull.Value handling in CreateSchema() or by explicitly setting defaults before INSERT.
[Auto-skip: issue lacks sufficient detail or requires major architectural work — handle manually]
[2026-03-01] Fixed: SetColumnDefaults + 12 missing columns + 14 Inherit columns + UpgradeMssqlSchema NOT NULL DEFAULT. Commit 7d5d7e03c.
[2026-03-02] Promoted to released. Verified: Fixed in commit 7d5d7e03c — SetColumnDefaults + 12 missing columns + 14 Inherit columns + UpgradeMssqlSchema NOT NULL DEFAULT.
